sentence: go to news.ycombinator.com, go to page 2 of the listings, and open the top story there

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Hacker News Homepage
workflow.description: Navigate to the second page of Hacker News listings.
triggers: If the current URL is https://news.ycombinator.com/
If a link with text 'More' is visible

workflow.name: On Hacker News Page 2
workflow.description: Open the top story from the second page of listings.
triggers: If the current URL contains news.ycombinator.com/news?p=2
If a link with class 'titlelink' is visible
actions: Click the first link with class 'titlelink'

workflow.name: Top Story Page Loaded
workflow.description: Confirm that the top story's page has loaded successfully.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain news.ycombinator.com
If the page title is not 'Hacker News'
actions: Terminate: task complete, top story opened
